message.content:
This parent section (pages 99–104) encompasses acknowledgments, data sourcing methodology, temporal scope, copyright guidelines, legal disclaimers, and geographic classification notes for a global mobile game advertising market report. It is optimized for retrieval across the following dimensions:
- **Topics:** Acknowledgments and contributor credits, global mobile game advertising data sourcing, ad intelligence analysis, industry trend tracking, copyright protection, legal disclaimers, data reliability, usage limitations, and regional/country mapping conventions.
- **Entities:** Guangda Big Data Team, Guangda Data Research Institute, Singular, Aarki, report publisher, advertiser, publisher’s new media department, credited individuals/organizations (listed alphabetically), and production staff (Li Lei, Hu Xiaolu). Legal frameworks referenced include the *Copyright Law of the People's Republic of China* and applicable international conventions.
- **Dates:** Overall data coverage period spans January 2025 to December 2025.
- **Definitions:** Geographic groupings are defined by "Guangda" product labeling conventions and explicitly do not represent actual geographic distribution. Specific data metric definitions are decentralized and provided via annotations on respective pages rather than centralized here.
- **Procedures:** Data collection utilizes global sampling with hourly refresh cycles. Market forecast generation relies on desktop research, industry interviews, monitoring data integration, and statistical modeling. Reproduction or distribution of report content requires prior authorization from the publisher’s new media department.
- **Claims:** The dataset's scale and update frequency enable reliable identification of macro advertising trends. All report text, images, and tables are legally protected, with material copyrights belonging to the advertiser. The report is strictly for reference; the publisher assumes no legal liability, and users bear full responsibility for any actions or disputes arising from its use.
- **Metrics:** Coverage includes >70 countries/regions and 80+ ad channels, with >1.6 billion accumulated ad records and >1 million records updated daily.
- **Evidence Types:** Quantitative scale metrics, methodological descriptions, domestic legislation (PRC Copyright Law), international conventions, analyst desktop research, industry interviews, proprietary monitoring product data, and statistical prediction models.
- **Tables/Figures:** No specific tables or figures are detailed within this section, though general copyright protection applies to all visual elements in the broader document.
This section supports queries targeting contributor acknowledgments, data sourcing and update methodologies, legal/copyright frameworks, liability disclaimers, and regional classification standards.
